stages.label: Merge to main
stages.note: USER greenlit. Fast-forwarded main 063563e -> b7f6c36 over SSH (F1+F2+F3+auto-backup now on main). Verified ff-safe (old main was a direct ancestor). Store build cuts off main.

stages.label: Name + support URL
stages.note: App Store listing name = Xavier — Expense Tracker (USER pick; set in ASC). Support URL already LIVE on GitHub Pages: https://tssq.github.io/ProjectXavier/ (200) + privacy https://tssq.github.io/ProjectXavier/privacy.html (200) — existing curated gh-pages site, public support email taedevelops@gmail.com (NOT the personal Apple ID email). Home-screen display name being set ProjectXavier -> Xavier in the store build.

stages.label: Store build 51 (metrics OFF)
stages.note: UPLOAD SUCCEEDED — App Store binary build 51 on ASC. Delivery UUID 1f555a52-7634-4acb-8fd9-38bbafc9e878. Metrics OFF (release fold; the clarify_* string check was stale — those are core ParseOutcome enums that ship in every build incl. accepted build 50; real gate METRICS_ENABLED=false in release with env unset). Bump commit 35c8d29 on main (ff from b7f6c36). CFBundleDisplayName Xavier; widget appex + app-group + 598BFA17 Apple Distribution cert on both binaries; CFBundleVersion 51. altool run from main after the subagent auto-mode classifier blocked it (not a signing failure).

stages.label: ASC submit (USER)
stages.note: SUBMITTED to the App Store — build 51 (Xavier — Expense Tracker; F1+F2+F3+auto-backup; metrics OFF). In Apple review queue as of 2026-07-21. Support/privacy URLs live; App Privacy = Data Not Collected; export-compliance false; 4 screenshots (1284x2778). Nothing left on our side — awaiting Apple's review outcome.

history.title: v1 App Store submission (F1+F2+F3+auto-backup)
history.note: v1 SUBMITTED to the App Store, pending Apple review. Build 51 off main (35c8d29), metrics OFF, display name Xavier, delivery 1f555a52. Screenshots 1284x2778; listing Xavier — Expense Tracker; Data Not Collected.

history.title: Auto-backup ON by default (opt-out safety net)
history.note: Auto-backup ON by default (opt-out) — commit 81956f9. Full gate: implement(626)->QA PASS-WITH-CONCERNS->review(feature APPROVE)->verify->push. Shipped in superset TestFlight beta 50 (F1+F2+F3+auto-backup, delivery f1194792). User: looks good -> greenlit merge to main.

history.title: F1 currency relabel + currency-aware scale (with F2+F3) — critical fixes
history.note: F1 committed 39dacb3 on claude/critical-fixes-f1-f3 (joins F2 37d6a8c + F3 bbdff85). Single-currency stays but is changeable via a consented RELABEL (not convert); ×100 scale made currency-aware (JPY/KRW 0-decimal) across money math, keypad, all 3 parsers, and the Swift widget. QA caught a relabel/backup concurrency Major (fixed: same runExclusive gate) + rollback-test gap; reviewer APPROVE-WITH-NITS (error-catch applied). 622 tests. TestFlight beta 49 (F1+F2+F3, delivery 172055d6) uploaded to device-test. main untouched (063563e, build 42). Awaiting device test; then Phase 3 store build.

history.title: F2 (self-transfer guard) + F3 (backup-on-edit) — critical fixes
history.note: Both committed on claude/critical-fixes-f1-f3 (F2 37d6a8c, F3 bbdff85) off main + uploaded as TestFlight BETA build 48 (delivery daeaf8c0) to device-test. F2 survived 3 rework rounds (QA restore-abort blocker → write/read schema split; 2 majors; reviewer pre-auth data-disclosure blocker). F3 QA coverage-clean + reviewer nit applied. 568 tests. main untouched (063563e, build 42). Awaiting the user device test; then F1 joins them for the store build.

history.title: BYOK 'key saved' affordance — saved-key card (last-4) + save flash
history.note: Full stage-gated ship on claude/phase2-byok (commit 4a2356e). Saved-key CARD (green check + 'Key saved' + key masked to last-4 via new pure maskApiKey) replaces the missable caption+empty field; '✓ Key saved' save-flash. QA PASS (2 Minors polished: code-point mask + clearFlash on Replace/Cancel); reviewer APPROVE-WITH-NITS (applied trim-consistency). 618 tests. Sim-verified the card renders ('••••••••TwAA') + Replace/Cancel. TestFlight build 47 uploaded (delivery 4d48e751). BETA on phase2-byok — awaiting the user's on-device confirm (Settings→BYOK shows the card). main untouched (063563e).

history.title: BYOK keychain-persist fix — key never saved on device (AFTER_FIRST_UNLOCK + verify-on-save)
history.note: ✅ DEVICE-CONFIRMED (build 46, delivery 332d2805). Reproduce-first diagnosis: built app/debug-byok.tsx probe, reproduced with the user's real key + exact input, ruled out transport/model/isOnline/secureTextEntry, pinned the real bug — the BYOK key never persisted on a signed device (secureStore.ts WHEN_UNLOCKED_THIS_DEVICE_ONLY vs the working DB key's AFTER_FIRST_UNLOCK); 'Test key' masked it by testing the in-memory pasted key, never the keychain. Fix: AFTER_FIRST_UNLOCK + verify-on-save (write→read-back→key-free ByokKeyPersistError) so a failed save can't be a silent success. QA found 2 Majors (native-throw bypass, provider-switch race) → fixed + re-gated; reviewer APPROVE-WITH-NITS (applied). commit 3c187eb, 610 tests. Sim-verified save→'A key is saved'→parse→http 200→confirm. On device: key persists + Test-key green + parsing works (the 'add an account first' block was just a fresh reinstall, not a parse failure). main untouched (063563e).

history.title: BYOK fix — raw fetch instead of @ai-sdk generateObject
history.note: Raw-fetch replaced @ai-sdk generateObject (real web-streams/Hermes fix) → TestFlight build 45 (delivery 4e540098). BUT shipped on a lazy verification: the sim check only ran Test-key + a BYOK-OFF heuristic parse, never a real BYOK-ON parse. User hit 'connection test succeeded, parsing doesnt work, confused face' on-device. Superseded by byok-parse-fix (reproduce the real device path first). Raw-fetch code itself is proven correct in Node; the on-device divergence is what byok-parse-fix pins down. main/build 42 untouched throughout.

history.title: Phase 2 · Step 2 — BYOK cloud providers (OpenAI + Anthropic) · v1.1
history.note: Built + shipped to TestFlight (builds 43, 44 with the model picker). Then reproduced in the iOS 26 sim: BYOK is BROKEN on-device — @ai-sdk generateObject needs web-streams Hermes lacks, so Test-key/parse fail 'couldn't reach' even though the model picker (raw fetch) lists all 9 Claude models and the key/model/network are all fine. Node evals passed because Node HAS web-streams (false confidence). Superseded by byok-raw-fetch (raw fetch to provider REST). No user impact: v1/main (build 42, no BYOK) unaffected; BYOK-on falls back to on-device parse.

history.title: BYOK dynamic model picker (live /v1/models dropdown)
history.note: commit 99746ed + bump da2f126 (build 44, phase2-byok). Free-text model id → tap-to-pick from the provider's live /v1/models (Anthropic filters on structured_outputs support), + Custom escape hatch + no-key/offline/rejected fallbacks. QA caught a provider-switch race (stale fetch clobbering the list) + reviewer caught a broken-Retry (error not cleared on success); both fixed, token-only guard. testKey 404→not_found; Anthropic default → claude-haiku-4-5. 572 tests. The picker (raw fetch) is exactly what proved BYOK's transport works on-device while generateObject doesn't.

history.title: Phase 2 · Step 1 — parse eval harness (dev-side)
history.note: commit c01335e (on claude/phase2-byok). evals/ scores parse engines vs a labeled set on amount/sign/date/category/payee, running the REAL production code. Isolated: runtime deps byte-identical, +devDeps only. Heuristic baseline 61%. NB: runs in Node — cannot catch RN-runtime issues (see the BYOK generateObject bug).

history.title: App Store submission binary (iPhone-only, build 42) + screenshots
history.note: delivery 1f0aad88…; bump 950b39e. iPhone-only (UIDeviceFamily=[1]). 5× fresh 6.9" screenshots (1320×2868, seeded data, no BYOK) delivered. Support + Privacy pages LIVE at tssq.github.io/ProjectXavier/ (+/privacy.html). App name 'Xavier — Expense Tracker'. WAITING ON USER: attach build 42 in ASC, paste metadata, App Privacy = Data Not Collected.

history.title: Drop the Supabase cloud backend (repo + deployed function)
history.note: commit 08cad58 — deleted supabase/ + tests + deployed edge fn. 'Data Not Collected / no server' holds end-to-end. main FF'd to 08cad58.
